blogs.title: Your docs, your frontend, our content engine
blogs.description: Enterprise teams can now own their docs frontend while Mintlify handles the content engine.
content: We built Mintlify to help teams create beautiful documentation quickly without worrying about infrastructure.
As companies scale, they often want more flexibility and ownership over their frontend experience.
With our new architecture, you can fully customize your frontend while Mintlify powers the content engine behind the scenes.
This unlocks better performance, flexibility, and integration with your internal tools.

blogs.title: Take control of your documentation system
blogs.description: New features for technical writers who need customizable documentation systems.
content: Documentation is a critical part of developer experience.
Teams need full control over their content structure, integrations, and workflows.
Our new tools make it easier to customize your documentation while maintaining performance.
Writers and engineers can now collaborate more efficiently.

blogs.title: Almost half your docs traffic is AI
blogs.description: Nearly half of all the traffic to your documentation site is now AI agents.
content: AI agents are rapidly becoming a major consumer of documentation.
This shift changes how documentation should be structured and optimized.
Clear structure and semantic content help AI understand your docs better.
Teams that adapt early will gain a competitive advantage.

blogs.title: @mintlify for better docs, faster
blogs.description: The improved agent means better contributions from my team.
content: Engineering teams need fast and reliable documentation workflows.
Our improved AI agent helps teams write and maintain documentation faster.
This improves productivity and documentation quality.
Teams can focus more on building products.
